recommendations.action: Search SRA/GenBank for virus sequences from missing orders
Search for DNA virus families not yet in database
recommendations.rationale: Database is heavily biased toward RNA viruses (91% ssRNA+)
Only Decapoda is well-represented; these 5 orders contain >50,000 species

recommendations.action: Search published virome studies for SRA accessions
recommendations.rationale: Many published viromes have SRA data but sequences not in GenBank Nucleotide
